title: Left Behind.
Commissioned.
content:
"Do their errands; enter into the sacrifice with them; be a link yourself in the divine chain, and feel the joy and life of it."
- ADELINE D. T. WHIT

title: Solstice.
A Home.
content:
What is a home? A guarded space,
    Wherein a few, unfairly blest,
    Shall sit together, face to face,
    And bask and purr and be at rest?
